trade.summary: Moderate bilateral trade. Svizzera exports pharmaceuticals, machinery, and watches. Thailandia exports electronics, food products (especially rice and seafood), and rubber. EFTA-Thailandia FTA negotiations have been under discussion.

diplomatic.summary: Stable and cordial relations. Svizzera and Thailandia have maintained diplomatic ties since the 19th century. Svizzera provides development cooperation in Thailandia and has hosted Thai political figures during periods of political turmoil. Cultural and tourism ties are active.

military.summary: No military alliance or significant defense cooperation. Svizzera's neutrality precludes formal military ties. Some Swiss defense equipment used by Thai forces.

financial.summary: Moderate bilateral investment. Swiss multinationals (Nestlé, Novartis) have significant Thailandia operations. Swiss banks manage Thai private wealth. Thailandia uses Swiss financial centers for international transactions.

energy.summary: Very limited direct energy trade. Svizzera supports Thailandia's renewable energy development through technical assistance.

scientific.summary: Modest scientific cooperation in tropical medicine, agriculture, and materials science. Some university exchange programs. Joint publications growing slowly.
